name: ErrorCodes
description: Customer is reporting a specific error code displayed on their equipment or screen — they can see a code and want to know what it means or how to fix it. The error code itself is the key information. This is not a general fault description without a code.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I'm getting error code {errorCode}
What does error code {errorCode} mean?
Help — I have error {errorCode} on my screen
Error code {errorCode} is showing up on my {faultsDeviceServiceType}
My screen says {errorCode} — what do I do?
Can you help me with error {errorCode} ?
I keep getting {errorCode} when I try to connect
{errorCode} is flashing up on my box
How do I fix error code {errorCode} ?
There's an error code on my screen — it says {errorCode}
I can't watch anything because of error {errorCode}
My connection is down and I'm seeing error {errorCode}
Error {errorCode} — what does it mean and how do I fix it?
I've tried restarting but I'm still getting {errorCode}
The error code is {errorCode}
Every time I turn on my box I see {errorCode}
{errorCode} keeps appearing on my screen
I've got {errorCode} and I can't get online
I have an error code on my screen — can you help?
There's an error message showing on my box
I'm seeing a code on my screen I don't recognise
error code {errorCode}
